name: 2-Opt Local Search
summary: Iterative 2-opt TSP local search seeded from a nearest-neighbor tour.
description: 2-opt is the main official local-search baseline in Rastion's routing-first phase. It improves a seeded tour with repeated segment reversals, emits progress events, and represents the kind of lightweight heuristic contributors can slot into the hub today.

capabilities.notes: Starts from a constructive tour and improves it with repeated 2-opt swaps.

limits.depot_assumptions: Assumes a single depot and one closed tour.
limits.notes: Suitable for Phase 1 TSP leaderboards; not yet generalized to VRP.

determinism: Pseudo-deterministic for a fixed seed and budget.
citations: 2-opt is a standard local-search neighborhood for the travelling salesman problem.
known_failure_modes: Can stall in shallow local minima when the iteration budget is too small.
Performance depends on the initial route quality.
